name: Wonderful Layered Peach Dessert
recipeInstructions:
FOR CRUST: Combine flour, sugar and pecans. Add the butter. Mix well and press mixture into the bottom of a 13 x 9 baking dish. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes. Cool.
FOR FILLING: Beat cream cheese and powdered sugar until light and fluffy. Fold in whipped topping and almond flavoring. Drain peaches and add to whipped topping mixture. Spoon over cooled crust and chill for several hours.
